pinyin: Tā zài guānchǎng hùn le hěn duō nián.
english: He has been in officialdom for many years.

sentence: 校长今天给优秀学生发奖。
pinyin: Xiàozhǎng jīntiān gěi yōuxiù xuéshēng fā jiǎng.
english: The principal is awarding prizes to outstanding students today.

sentence: 总统出行时总有卫队随行。
pinyin: Zǒngtǒng chūxíng shí zǒng yǒu wèiduì suíxíng.
english: The president always has a guard escort when traveling.

sentence: 你帮了他这么多，他理应感谢你。
pinyin: Nǐ bāng le tā zhème duō, tā lǐ yīng gǎnxiè nǐ.
english: You've helped him so much; he really ought to thank you.

sentence: 她喜欢给远方的朋友写信。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān gěi yuǎnfāng de péngyou xiě xìn.
english: She enjoys writing letters to friends far away.
